generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. Remember when that one European supplier delayed critical components for our defense systems? We can't afford to depend on others for our safety. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-reliant—it's about ensuring our troops have what they need when they need it. Let's not wait for another crisis to act. #NationalSecurityFirst #SupportOurTroops
